Ben milletvekiliydim. Neden vermedi? Çünkü ulusunu savunuyor, ben de Türkiye'yi savunmakla mükellef bir milletvekiliyim. Ben şimdi size diyorum ki: Benim dilime, kültürüme benden aldığınız paranın karşılığını vermeden yapacağınız hiçbir katkı bir katkı değildir. Atatürk filmini baskılar sonucu yayınlamadınız, bu sizin yüzyıllık geçmişinizin kara bir sayfasıdır. Artı incelik bir olguyu anlatırken o dilin bütün olanaklarını kullanabilecek çeviride, seslendirmede yaratmaktadır. Eğer siz bunu kullanmıyorsanız, bu ülkenin çocuklarına küfür ve diğer unsurlar konusunda bile bir incelik göstermiyorsanız o sizin büyük ayıbınızdır; o filmden elde ettiğiniz paranın belirli bir miktarının bu tür kültürel olgulara dönüştürülmesi için biz de burada gerekeni yaparız.
Sizden bir tek ricam var; siz global şirketin çalışanlarısınız, Türkiye'deki çalışanlarısınız ya da Avrupa'daki çalışanlarısınız, global şirketlerin ruhlarını kendi ruhlarınızla değiştirmeyin. Biz, bu ülkenin insanı olarak bu ülkeye sorumluluk, bağlılık, bu ülkeye hizmet etme yükümlülüğü olan insanlar olarak sizleri şirketlerle bütünleştirmiyoruz. Bizim buradaki eleştirilerimiz sizlere değil şirketin kendi yapısına. Ben yüzyıllık şirkete buradan laf söylüyorum, Türkiye'de haberde var, tiyatroda var, sinemada var, her yerde var, bunu söylemekle mükellefim ben. Ben korkarsam o zaman sizin o global şirketiniz bu ülkede her şeyi yapar. Siz sakın o şirketin kimliğine bürünmeyin, biz sizi öyle görmüyoruz. Ayırarak, kişisel herhangi bir şey yok, burada sorduğumuz her soru, peşine düştüğümüz her ayrıntı bu ülkenin çıkarı içindir. Benim görevim, sorumluluğum, yetkilendirilmem bu konumdadır ve bunu sonuna kadar takipçisi olacağım.
Amerika'da bacanak var benim, telefon edeceğim, şu borsaya gir, bana şunları at diyeceğim, öğleden sonra gelir herhâlde. Bu da Meclisin itibarına büyük bir suikast oluyor Başkanım. Sizden ricam şudur: Buraya gelen arkadaşlar bu rakamlar çok gizliyse burada açıklamasınlar, biz gizli bir oturum yapalım, o oturumda söylesinler veya size söylesinler, siz bizimle yapın, yoksa gelmesinler.
BAŞKAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Doğru söylüyorsun.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Yoksa gelmesinler, gelmelerinin bir anlamı kalmıyor.
LEVENT UYSAL (Mersin) - Disney'deki açıklama zaten farklı geliyorsa işte o zaman açıklasınlar, ne olacak ki yani?
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi bütün ulusların parlamentolarından, bütün ulusların borsalarından daha aşağıda bir itibara sahip bir yer değildir, şanlı bir Meclistir, emperyalizme karşı bir mücadelenin örgütlendiği büyük bir mücadele karargâhıdır, o nedenle bu şanlı Meclise bu tür eksikliklerle gelmeyi bir nakisa sayıyorum efendim.
records.englishTranslation:
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Welcome.
DISNEY XD TELEVISION PUBLISHING JOINT STOCK COMPANY GENERAL MANAGER CENK SONER - Welcome.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Now, of course, I am a Disney fan too. I watched your duck movie with my son the other day, it was very good. I go downstairs at night, I secretly watch your superhero movies, it's so nice. Have you watched the latest movie?
DISNEY XD TELEVISION PUBLISHING JOINT STOCK COMPANY GENERAL MANAGER CENK SONER - Which one?
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - You showed X-Men etc. just now.
DISNEY XD TELEVISION PUBLISHING CORPORATION GENERAL MANAGER CENK SONER - X-Men, Deadpoll&Wolverine.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Can we have our friends listen to Deadpoll&Wolverine here for five minutes?
DISNEY
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Okay.
I will tell you two things: One of them is that you are making money from here. You explained to the world why you did not release this movie, what did you say to us? "We see the cost of locally produced films as a problem." You tried to say that just now. "We are getting rid of those costs." you said.
DISNEY
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - OK, that's what you said. Actually, there is a big campaign of the Armenian lobbies behind it, you don't say that.
Two things: You are a big company, a foundation, why do you succumb to the campaigns of lobbies? How many movies have you taken off the air in America as a result of the campaign of such lobbies? You are a big company.
LEVENT UYSAL (Mersin) - Zero.
CHAIRMAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - You listen, take notes, and we will respond.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Let me ask my questions: How many companies and films do you have? Now, my understanding of morality is this: If it does not disturb anyone, if it does not constitute a crime, if it does not harm anyone's life or property, and if it is not a problem in terms of the law, a person can live what he wants. What is the age to watch The Return of Wolverine?
DISNEY
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Look, watch the movie and see how you find the language of the movie. The language of the film is full of beautiful examples of our swearing literature that I have heard for the first time.
BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Please let's not say "beautiful" but rather "distinguished".
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Well, let's say "distinguished". No no it was nice. I made a compilation of swearing, swearing is a culture's way of expressing itself, swearing is not a bad thing, but whether it will happen when you watch it with your child, your spouse or your friends is subject to each family's own evaluation. Take a look at what age group it appeals to, watch it for five minutes and call me. "It's suitable." Let's say we can watch it together or here.
CHAIRMAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Sir, in order to make a creative contribution there; As they say, "If you don't like it, change it."
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Sir, that's what we say, "If you don't like it, change it." but he says: "This is the movie that people watch most in the world.

"
MAYOR HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - So this is "If you don't like it, change it." Doesn't explain the word, does it?
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - It's like this, sir: For example, the movie Ararat. I went and bought the movie Ararat from a European publisher. They were burning down cinemas in our country when the movie Ararat was released. When I was a television owner, I bought it and watched it, thinking, "What nonsense is this? If the Turkish nation watched this, it would benefit a lot, no one would offend anyone because of it." I said, I published it. After that day, the movie Ararat was released, no one was hurting anyone, it was just crazy. But we did not let him watch the movie Ararat with his children. What time did we broadcast it? We put it on the air after midnight.
Now, you are platforms without time limits, structures without time limits; While this language, content, content selection, management and direction of capital by pressure groups have access to all our data, our lobbies have had zero effect on you. While you earn money from us, our impact on you is zero. You cut us down, you divided the film into two over Saner, you saved yourself like that, you did things, etc., but we have become a nation that has zero impact on you. But you bowed to the pressure of two Armenian lobbies. That's why greatness is not financial size, greatness is in human rights, enlightening society, clarity of thought, self-expression, sustainability of your company. A century-old company, by the orders and instructions of four unknown lobbies and a political figure like Ataturk. You can criticize, "He did these things wrong." You can say, we will respect it, we will tell the truth, but you took down something that you paid money for and that you contributed to, because you were afraid, because you were unfair, because you were a coward, and because you were ignorant, and you tried to fix the situation by doing other things about Ataturk, despite the tons of money that this nation has poured into you. I do this
I don't accept it, it's up to you.
Now, I want to ask you some other things.
CENK SONER, GENERAL MANAGER OF DISNEY
MAYOR HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Wait a minute.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Don't give it to me, let my questions end, answer them all together.
One: How much of the Turkish communications market do you cover, including your news channels? Is this rate 7 percent, what my President said?
CHAIRMAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Independent sources say so on digital platforms.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - So, how much does it cover, including other parties, that is, news sources, and what is your number of viewers? In other words, do you have the size to create a monopoly in our country? What is that size?
DISNEY
CHAIRMAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Okay, you will answer this too, take notes, Mr. Cenk.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - In other words, "We do not have such greatness." you can say.
How much of our communications market do you have? How much of our audience market do you have? What are the advertising and subscription revenues you receive from both markets in Türkiye? Other products, that is, Disney products that you brought as "franchises", textiles, glasses, bowls, this and that.

What do you call them, "Direct marketing"?
DISNEY XD TELEVISION PUBLISHING JOINT STOCK COMPANY GENERAL MANAGER CENK SONER - Consumer.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Okay.
What are the incomes you earn in these areas? Regarding these, you said that you did some work in Türkiye regarding the income you earned, you said that you developed social projects, I think these were generally in the form of campaigns, that is, an awareness campaign on a phone number or an SMS number, you asked for money from me. What do you have to offer as a direct contribution? What did you directly contribute to Türkiye? I request this.
Are there any local heroes you produce in Türkiye, which you see as a local market? Do you spend anything on these heroes? So, here is what I understand from your speeches: You are a great world giant who attaches great importance to our national and spiritual values. Have you created a local hero, do we have a symbol? In other words, "We define Türkiye with this symbol." Is there anything you can say?
I heard from you that 400 people work, right?
DISNEY XD TELEVISION PUBLISHING JOINT STOCK COMPANY GENERAL MANAGER CENK SONER - Yes.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - You have 400 employees. Where are you organized with 400 employees of this size, what do you do, how many of them are marketing staff, how many of them are in Türkiye? For example, you probably have a "call center". Do you have a "call center"?
DISNEY XD TELEVISION PUBLISHING JOINT STOCK COMPANY GENERAL MANAGER CENK SONER - Of course, within the company.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Where? In Türkiye or another country?
DISNEY
CHAIRMAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - OK, take a note and we will answer.
HASAN ÖZTÜRK (Bursa) - Interactive question.
CHAIRMAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - You are also saying the same thing. When you become a master politician. Also "Answer all together." he says, then asks a question.
HASAN ÖZTÜRK (Bursa) - It is interactive.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Also, Mr. President, we would like to state that we have complete intellectual agreement on the points you made and stated in the opening ceremony.
PRESIDENT HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Thank you.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - However, I would like to correct one deficiency.
PRESIDENT HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Of course, sir.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - We are not only against virtual gambling, but also against gambling itself.
PRESIDENT HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Thank you!
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - As the Republican People's Party, we support keeping all gambling elements away from the Turkish society. We want it to be known that we are against the opening of casinos and the existence of virtual gambling venues, all of these. We would like to state that we are ready to provide whatever support is necessary to protect children regarding gaming sites. Because the elements you mentioned include the point of preventing the harm of freedom, not hindering it.
MAYOR HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Absolutely.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - I would like to express that we have full support on this issue, based on the factors you have stated.
PRESIDENT HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Thank you very much, thank you.
Mr. Cenk, here you go.

DISNEY As you know, since this is a movie, we are actually submitting all the age restrictions here to the Ministry of Culture. As you know, we broadcast it in this way both in the cinema and on Disney +, according to the age restriction issued by the Ministry of Culture. That's why it's not a decision we make on our own, after all.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Do you do the dubbing?
DISNEY XD TELEVISION PUBLISHING JOINT STOCK COMPANY GENERAL MANAGER CENK SONER - Yes.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - If you ask your translators why they translated the slang word "gun" with its slang meaning instead of "leaf", you will get more detailed information.
PRESIDENT HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Okay, take note of this too.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Of course, there are other points. That is, from the beginning to the end of the movie, from the first minute to the last second.
CHAIRMAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - So here - now, of course, I don't want to intervene, we will listen to our deputies - the issue is very important. In other words, here is the protection of the family, the protection of the individual, the protection of the society; Requiring their protection cannot be synonymous with "censorship". So we defend freedoms, certainly, but we should not cause confusion of concepts here. We are not talking about you personally, that is different.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Of course, we love you.
MAYOR HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - But I think we need to focus a little more on the issue of these platforms. For example, young friends here.
YUKSEL MANSUR KILINÇ (Istanbul) - Not a little, but more.
MAYOR HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - More. I didn't want to exaggerate. I do not think that the new generation watches normal television anymore.
Yes, we are waiting for detailed answers to Mr. Tuncay's questions.
Here you go, Mr. Cenk.
DISNEY Of course, these are not information that we can disclose specifically for Türkiye since we are listed on the stock exchange, but all this financial information - which includes information about Turkey - is disclosed every quarter and every three months in America.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - So, I will learn from America.
LEVENT UYSAL (Mersin) - Tell me what has been announced, what are you doing?
MAYOR HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Like this, sir, just a minute.
Sir, says: "I cannot give." This law allows this; Dear Deputy, let's ask Disney, let's say: "How many subscribers do you have, how much do you have?" Let's learn them. But they have a 7 percent share among the platforms in Türkiye, but they are newly established, I think they will have a larger share in the coming period. So, I don't have to interpret what Tuncay Özkan said, but the common question for all of us is this: How many people do you employ in Türkiye - this applies to you, platform "x" and other transnational digital platforms - how much tax do you pay, how much income do you earn? We, like the rest of the public, are curious about the answers to these questions, but we will find out.
Here you go.

CENK SONER, GENERAL MANAGER OF DISNEY We can also give you the link to our website in America, where all the financial information is explained. All information is shared there every three months - if you want to follow it for the future. In accordance with the stock exchange rules, all this information is shared there in a consolidated manner.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Let me say something for the record.
MAYOR HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Wait, let him complete it.
Let's continue.
DISNEY As I mentioned, we do not disclose these things to the public much, but when the earthquake happened, we - our own company employees, the company - collected a lot of money within ourselves - whether it was aid organizations or ourselves - and delivered it to the Hatay region. In our last TEV-related campaign, we donated all the income we earned from all advertising segments within that program. In addition, we make a financial contribution to all the social responsibility activities we carry out, both individually, as company employees, and as an institution. But, as I mentioned, these are in no way "Just a little more advertising, that's all we've done." Frankly, we do not share it. As I mentioned at the beginning, the reason why I told you about these social responsibility projects was because you also contribute to such projects every day. That's why these are not the amounts we publicly announce or say. But we always do these within our own structure and within our own means.
As you said, abroad has already made statements about Ataturk.
PRESIDENT HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Let me ask something.
DISNEY When you look at all the statements made - the beginning of this work - and when Disney announced this, you can see that these measures were already taken long before all this, and that they were even reported in many press and abroad.
CHAIRMAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Mr. Cenk, look, don't do this. Wait a second.
Let's do it this way, there is a method that these television broadcasters do: Question and answer.
One: Disney+ or - you are the General Manager of this company - you cannot be told by any lobby, the Armenian lobby, another lobby or a pressure group, "Do not air this series." Were you pressured to ask - because when you don't answer this question like that, when you give a general answer, it gets confusing? "Do not broadcast this series." Has there been a request?
DISNEY
PRESIDENT HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - OK, it's over.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - America has a statement.
DISNEY XD TELEVISION PUBLISHING CORPORATION GENERAL MANAGER CENK SONER - No, it is beyond us. I have already read the official statement made by abroad to you here, let me read it again.
LEVENT UYSAL (Mersin) - Didn't he come to the one in Turkey?
AHMET BÜYÜKGÜMÜZ (Yalova) - He came to Global.
MAYOR HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Okay, wait a minute.
I think it's like this.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - We are not prosecutors or anything. You say, “No.

" and then "How can I say 'No.' We don't have the mood to say "What do you say?"
PRESIDENT HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Declaration is essential. What Cenk Bey said:
LEVENT UYSAL (Mersin) - Why do you have such a thing against Atatürk?
MAYOR HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - No, no, wait a minute, let's not personalize the issue.
LEVENT UYSAL (Mersin) - Of course, we personalize it. "He did not come to Türkiye." "According to what is said from America."
MAYOR HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Sir, wait a minute, wait a minute.
LEVENT UYSAL (Mersin) - He will tell you in general.
DISNEY
LEVENT UYSAL (Mersin) - Yes, he always explains!
CHAIRMAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Is there any pressure on you?
DISNEY XD TELEVISION PUBLISHING JOINT STOCK COMPANY GENERAL MANAGER CENK SONER - There is no such thing.
PRESIDENT HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - OK, it's over.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - It's over.
DISNEY
CHAIRMAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Well, here, I think the main thing to talk about - this issue is important for the Turks - is the issue of contents, contents are important. In other words, when it comes to content production, Türkiye is one of the leading countries in the TV series industry.
My dear representatives, now that Disney's officials have arrived. How many TV series are shot in Türkiye, how many of them are released globally, how much support is given for their release?
You answer Mr. Tuncay's questions fully, then I will give the floor to my other deputies.
DISNEY
When you look at local productions. As you know, a year has passed since these austerity measures were taken. A year is actually a very long time when you look at it from a commercial perspective. It was discussed abroad what kind of model it should evolve within this year, and these strategies were tried to be determined. This is valid not only for Türkiye but also for the whole world. In fact, all our content stopped for a year, both in Türkiye and abroad. Currently, as we enter the new year, Turkey has been determined as a country where local production should be done, as a new global content strategy. As I mentioned at the beginning, this is due to the fact that Turkish TV series are watched a lot abroad.
Here, Tuncay Bey asked, "Did we produce any heroes?" saying. In fact, many of our actors from these Turkish TV series are known all over the world. Plus, in all these series, the life of the Turkish people, our cultural values, our regions, our regions. Istanbul is advertised so much in our TV series. In fact, all of our series are broadcast all over the world. As I mentioned, our series are broadcast in more than 170 countries, translated into 60 languages. This is not just for us, the series broadcast on all national channels are also broadcast abroad.

That's why Turkish content has actually become a very popular industry all over the world. In this context too. Why is this so? Because we also support it. In fact, we have very talented actors and people in this system, from scriptwriters and producers to executive producers. So, this value comes out of this and we continue to do these things. That's why a new model has already been created for Türkiye, and parallel in other countries; You have already seen different things. First, in America, we turned to a model with some advertising. What is this? In fact, it means extra income to bring the entire financial structure to a better level. Later, these commercial models appeared in certain countries in Europe. This commercial model will also come to Türkiye, and studies are being carried out in that context. That's why we are actually approaching this new period, this new year, with a different strategy. As I said, we stopped making any local productions, actually putting out any content, for a long period of a year. Now, in parallel with the new content strategy we have received, we have started to make local productions again. In this regard, the genre always comes to us from abroad, all decisions are made there, in fact, we only determine and present the content that the Turkish audience will prefer and want in the desired genre, with our entire team here. That's why, in that context, 4 contents were determined in the first stage, they will be implemented within the next year and then we will continue our productions. By the way, as I mentioned, this is also in the new financial structure. In order to deliver better content to our audience in Türkiye, as well as all over the world, we must increase our advertising efficiency.
As a result, there is actually interest in such a structure in order to be able to satisfy ourselves and provide better service to our audience with this income. As you can guess, this structure means extra income, a more sound financial structure, a more sustainable structure, and this was the reason for all this change. After all, we are a global company, those who follow the American stock market already know this very well, all these events are actually announced there beforehand, when all these strategies will happen, when they will arrive. Afterwards, it spread from America to all countries over time. That's why it's not that difficult to predict these things, and when the time comes, we adapt the content that is there on Disney+.
PRESIDENT HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Yes.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Sir, there is something for a minute that I would like to be recorded in the minutes in exchange for a few questions.
CHAIRMAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Then I will give the floor to Mr. Muammer.
Here you go.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - First of all, the Atatürk movie was not published where it was promised, it was smuggled out of the main sources due to the pressure of the Armenian lobby, for the reasons I have just mentioned.
Disney has no contribution to the Turkish TV series industry; the Turkish TV series industry has created itself before. The Turkish TV series industry is popular in certain areas, just like Brazilian and other Indian TV series, which is a very good thing, but there are various examples of this in the world.

We said this so that we can rise to higher categories, earn more money, and create our heroes.
CHAIRMAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - We also need to mention the rights of TV series workers.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Of course, of course, we are their advocates here until the end, but since numbers and figures are not given, we cannot say anything about the rights of employees - who are also employees. However, contribution to a country can be made through the language of that country. I am not a global citizen, I am a citizen of the Republic of Türkiye. When I applied to the American Ambassador for my passport to be processed in America, he said, "You are an enemy of America." "You are the enemy of American interests." He didn't give me a passport. Why didn't he? I was a member of parliament. Why didn't he? Because he defends his nation, and I am a member of parliament obliged to defend Türkiye. Now I say to you: Any contribution you make to my language and culture is not a contribution without giving me the money you receive from me. You did not release the Ataturk film as a result of pressure, this is a black page of your century-old history. Plus, it creates subtlety in translation and vocalization that can use all the possibilities of that language while explaining a phenomenon. If you do not use this, if you do not show any tact to the children of this country even when it comes to swearing and other elements, it is your great shame; We will do whatever is necessary to ensure that a certain amount of the money you earn from that film is transformed into such cultural phenomena.
I have only one request from you; You are the employees of the global company, the employees in Türkiye or the employees in Europe, do not replace the souls of the global companies with your own souls. As people of this country, we do not integrate you with companies as people who have responsibility, loyalty and obligation to serve this country. Our criticisms here are not to you, but to the company's own structure. I am criticizing the century-old company from here. It is in the news in Türkiye, it is in the theater, it is in the cinema, it is everywhere, I am obliged to say this. If I am afraid, then your global company will do everything in this country. Don't impersonate that company, we don't see you that way. By separating, there is nothing personal, every question we ask here, every detail we pursue is for the benefit of this country. This is my duty, my responsibility, my authorization, and I will follow it to the end.
I have a brother-in-law in America, I will call him and ask him to enter the stock market and throw me these, he will probably come in the afternoon. This is a major assassination of the reputation of the Parliament, President. My request from you is this: If these figures are top secret, the friends who come here should not disclose them here. We will hold a secret session, let them tell them in that session or let them tell you, you do it with us, otherwise they will not come.
MAYOR HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - You are right.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Otherwise, they should not come, there is no point in them coming.
LEVENT UYSAL (Mersin) - If Disney's statement already sounds different, then they should explain it, so what will happen?

AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - The Grand National Assembly of Turkey is not a place with a lower reputation than the parliaments of all nations, the stock exchanges of all nations, it is a glorious Assembly, a great struggle headquarters where a struggle against imperialism is organized, therefore, I consider it a failure to come to this glorious Assembly with such shortcomings, sir.

records.originalTurkish:
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Teşekkür ederim Başkanım.
Hoş geldiniz arkadaşlar.
NETFLIX KAMU POLİTİKALARI DİREKTÖRÜ PELİN MAVİLİ - Hoş bulduk.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Siz uluslararası bir şirketsiniz değil mi? 190 ülkede yayın yapıyorsunuz, yaklaşık 33 milyar doların üzerinde bir gelir elde ediyorsunuz. EBITDA sonrası net kârınız dünyada 10 milyar dolara yakın, Türkiye'deki kârınızı da şöyle hesaplıyorum... RTÜK payını ne kadar yatırdınız 1,5?
NETFLIX KAMU POLİTİKALARI DİREKTÖRÜ PELİN MAVİLİ - Onu da basının olmadığı ortamda paylaşayım Sayın Vekilim.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Şöyle baktığım zaman 200 milyon doları aşan bir gelir elde ettiğinizi var sayıyorum. Bu yaptıklarınız yetmez, sizin Türkiye'ye yapacağınız yatırımın daha büyük boyutlara ulaşması lazım. Bunları bize bir iyilik diye yapmıyorsunuz. Bunların tamamı; karşılığını aldığınız, Türk insanına ödemeniz gereken, yapmanız gereken şeyler. Pek çok yayın kuruluşundan daha iyi, daha duyarlı bir yayın sistematiğiniz var, tebrik ederim ama siz kurumsal iletişimi tek kanatlı olarak yönettiğiniz için hiç eleştirilmeden bugünlere kadar geliyorsunuz. Sizin Türkiye'de veya dünyada "Destekliyoruz." dediğiniz kültürel çalışmalar için binlerce yıldır insanlar kendi hayatlarından her bir saniyeyi veriyorlar. Siz onlara değer katmıyorsunuz, o değerli şeyleri insanlara ulaştırarak bundan da gelir elde ediyorsunuz. Şimdilik reklam yayınlamıyorsunuz ama abonelik gelirlerinin üzerinden reklama yönelik çalışmalarınız devam ediyor. Bütün bunlarla ilgili olarak yaptıklarınız için teşekkür ederim ama yeterli görmediğimizi söylemek isterim.
BAŞKAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - "Evet ama yetmez." mi diyorsunuz?
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Yetmez, asla yetmez çünkü siz çok uluslu bir şirket olarak Türkiye'nin kültür hayatına öyle müdahale ettiniz, dünyanın kültür hayatına öyle müdahale ettiniz ki sinema endüstrisini yok ettiniz. Evimize kadar girip bize her şeyi sunmayı bir "Ya, bak ben de sana çok büyük bir şey yapıyorum." diye anlatmayın. Evimize kadar geliyorsunuz; çocuklarımızı, kadınlarımızı, insanlarımızı evlerinde yataktayken, otururken en zayıf anında yakalıyorsunuz ve ona karşı bir kültürel etki yaratıyorsunuz. Bunun ölçülmeyeceğini, bunun denetlenmeyeceğini, bunun daha iyisinin istenmeyeceğini düşünüyorsanız aldanıyorsunuz.
Buraya gelirken tüm yabancı şirketlerin, tüm çok uluslu şirketlerin yaptığı şeyi yapıyorsunuz. RTÜK buranın bir kuruluşu, biz bütün bu rakamı... Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisinden veri saklamak ya da Türk medyasından veri saklamak size bir şey kazandırmaz çünkü zaten biz o verileri, her şeyi Amerika'daki borsadan alabiliyoruz. Yani bütün bunlarla ilgili çalışmalarımızı yapabiliyoruz ama burada böyle bizi küçümser bir uluslararası şirket tavrıyla durduğunuzda, bu verileri sunmadığınızda bu sizin için iyi bir şey değil. Burası Türk milletini temsil ediyor. Ben şahsen pek çok şey söyleyebilirim ama beni frenleyen Türk milletinin sorumluluğu var, o kapsamda size birkaç şey sunmak istiyorum sormak istiyorum.
Oraya geçmeden önce, Sayın Başkanım -hoş geldiniz kısmı bu- size çok katılarak ve acil önlem isteyerek sanal kumar konusunda ve oyun siteleri konusunda çocuklarımızı, Türkiye'yi koruyacak, dünyanın başına bela olmuş bu uygulamadan ne tür bir çalışma getirirseniz, o çalışmaya bizi davet ederseniz sonuna kadar size destek vereceğiz. Yasal boyutu da dâhildir; kumarın yasa dışısı, yasal içerikli olanı yoktur, kendi kültürünü yaratanı vardır Spor Toto gibi, Loto gibi, Millî Piyango gibi. Dünyada bunların dışındaki her türlü uygulamanın toplumları nasıl çökerttiğini gördük. Üç şeye yol açıyor Las Vegas'ta, Amerika'da yapılan çalışmaya göre. Ki bugün Las Vegas kumarhanelerin merkezi diye gözükür ya, Amerikan devleti oradan kumar gelirini yüzde 25'le sınırlamıştır, "entertainment" eğlence bölümünden gelir elde etmektedir. Toplumun yolsuzluk boyutunu büyütmektedir kumar; kent halkını, var olduğu yerdeki insanları yoksullaştırmaktadır. En çok da yoksulları yoksullaştırmaktadır, onların cebindeki son umudu, son kuruşu sömürerek çok büyük zararlara yol açmaktadır. Biz, sanal kumar ve diğer uygulamalar, oyunlar karşısında halkımızı çaresiz bırakamayız. Bu konuda çok katkı sunmak istiyoruz, halkımız çaresiz değil. Kumara karşı hep beraber mücadele etmek konusunda çağrıda bulunuyoruz. Sizin çağrınıza katılıyoruz ve biz diyoruz ki: Kumar nerede varsa
yok etmek üzere bu konuda siz ne getirirseniz katkımızı sunarak size destek vereceğiz.
Ayrıca, Sağlık Bakanlığına buradan bir çağrıda bulunmak istiyorum: Tıpkı sigarada olduğu gibi uyuşturucu ve kumar konusunda, tedavi konusunda -biliyorsunuz, bu bir bağımlılık sorunudur- bunun tedavisi konusunda hemen bir ücretsiz hat açarak, halkımıza ücretsiz sağlık tedavi hizmeti sunarak bununla mücadele etmeye bir yerden başlamak gerekir. Belki Netflix kumar konusunda, sanal kumar konusunda içeriklerine daha dikkatli bir şekilde bakar.
İnsanımız sahipsiz değil, biz burada onun temsilcileri olarak bulunuyoruz. Mutlaka Türkiye'yi, sizin söylediğiniz o ayarlar konusunda da düzeltmek gerekiyor, katkı sunmak gerekiyor, yeni çağa uyarlamak gerekiyor.
Hollywood yandı, Hollywood'u önce Netflix yaktı. Kavgalar, büyük gürültüler, bir kültürel sorun olarak karşımıza çıktı Netflix ama bugün hegemonyasını inşa eder bir durumda. Ama şirketlerin hegemonyası, biliyorsunuz, daha iyisi çıkana kadar sürer; bu yarın olur, ertesi gün olur, bir şekilde biter. O yüzden, kamusal iletişiminizi doğru yapmanızı tavsiye ederim, yanlış yapıyorsunuz.
İkincisi, Türkiye'nin kültür hayatına yaygınlaşması konusunda yaptığınız katkılar için teşekkür ederiz ama unutmayın, size çok şey katıyoruz. Kültür hayatında sizin kazanmanız için o kadar çok mücadelelerden geliyoruz ki siz bizim hikâyelerimizi anlatarak bizim üstümüzde bir yerde değilsiniz; siz, bizim hikâyelerimizin hiçbir şeyi değilsiniz, bir uluslararası şirketsiniz, bizim hikâyelerimizden para kazanıyorsunuz. Sizden önce de film çekmeyi biliyorduk, sizden önce de gidip ödüller alıyorduk.
NETFLIX KAMU POLİTİKALARI DİREKTÖRÜ PELİN MAVİLİ - Tabii, tabii.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Netflix falan filan yokken New York Festivali'nden altın, bronz ve platin ödül aldık; siz yoktunuz. Bütün bu süreçleri kendiniz yorumlarken bu birikimlere saygı duyarak yorumlayın lütfen.
Üçüncüsü, sizin doğru yaptığınız şeyleri de takdirle karşılıyorum. Özellikle çocuk, yetişkin ve genç ayrımlarınız, bununla ilgili sınıflandırmalarınız, diğerlerine de örnek olabilecek bir şey ama siz tekele doğru gittiğiniz için bunları zaten yapmak zorundasınız. Dünyada, 192 ülkede bu kadar çok izlenen sizden başka bir şirket var mı? Birkaç tane ardılınız var, geliyor. Ama sizin bu tekel olma özelliğinizin size yüklediği sorumluluklardan kaçamazsınız. Onun için, bütün bu süreçleri yönetirken Türkiye'nin kültürüne, değerlerine ve ekonomisine yapacağınız katkı konusunda buraya net bilgiler vermek zorundasınız. Bu net bilgileri vermeden burada böyle reklam sunumu gibi yapıp gitmek...
Son "teaser"ınız kötü olmuş. Ben bu işleri bilen bir adamım; hem müziği kötü hem tanıtımı kötü, sizden beklemeyeceğim bir amatörlük. Buraya gelirken daha güzel filmler yapın, gelin; böyle kötü filmlerle gelmeyin. Burası reklam filmlerinizin yayınlanacağı bir mecra değil, buraya bilgi vererek gelmelisiniz.
Şimdi, siz bize ne söylediniz, ne anlattınız çok uluslu şirket olarak? Kazancınızı söylemediniz, üye sayınızı söyleyemediniz. Yani "İletişim Başkanlığının filmini yayınladım." "Başkanım, ne kadar güzel konuştunuz, o filmi de koydum." falan, öyle değil. Filmlerinizin dili kötü. Filmlerinizdeki o tür özellikleri yapımcılara yüklüyorsunuz, kendiniz herhangi bir sorumluluk almıyorsunuz. Bunları yapsanıza, dilini daha güzel bir Türkçe hâline getirsenize. Niye hiç o konuda yatırım yapmıyorsunuz, Türkçeye katkı anlamında niye hiçbir çalışmanız yok? "Türk 60 tane içerik ürettik." diyorsunuz, bu içeriklerin tamamı sizin uluslararası politikalarınızdan geçerek üretiliyor. Bizim politikalarımız değil sizin politikalarınız geçerli oluyor. Bizim sadece yasaklarımız var ama o içeriklere katkı sunarken kültürel gelişmesini, zenginleşmesini çok düşündüğünüzü zannetmiyorum. Senaryolarında, sizin ürettiğiniz senaryolarda, sizin ürettiğiniz işlerde yereldeki sektörü büyütecek bir şey yok, yaygınlaştıracak bir şey var. Neden buradaki, Türkiye'deki sektörü büyütmeye çalışmıyorsunuz da yaygınlaştırarak daha çok para kazanmaya çalışıyorsunuz? Neden senaryo yatırımınızı sadece belirli ölçülerde tutuyorsunuz da daha güçlü, daha nitelikli bir hâle getirmiyorsunuz? Biraz önce sunduğunuz şeyler, sizin ara eleman ihtiyacınızı karşılayacak eğitim potansiyeli tutumunuzu gösteriyor ama burada senaryo zenginleştirme, Türk diline yatırım, Türk sanatçısına yatırım konusunda sizin çok yetersiz kaldığınızı söyleyebilirim.
Bütün bunlarla ilgili olarak daha fazla konuşacağız ama şimdilik, buraya hiçbir şey vermediğinizi, hiçbir aydınlatıcı bilgiyle gelmediğinizi, bir Netflix propagandasıyla geldiğinizi
ve buradan böyle gideceğinizin de çok uygun olacağını da zannetmiyorum. Başkanım, bize bir beş dakikalık kapalı oturum sağlarsınız, arkadaşlar paylaşmak istemedikleri bilgileri paylaşsınlar.
Teşekkür ederim.
BAŞKAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Pelin Hanım, buyurun.
Sayın Tuncay Özkan tecrübeli bir Türkiye Cumhuriyeti vatandaşıdır, eleştirileri serttir fakat içerikleri önemlidir; dikkatinize sunarım. Bir savunma mekanizmasıyla zaten cevap vermeyeceğinizi düşünüyorum. Çok kısa bir cevabınızı alayım, sonra Sevilay Hanım'ın, Sayın Sarıgül'ün ve Levent ağabeyin sorularını alacağım. Çok kısa...
NETFLIX KAMU POLİTİKALARI DİREKTÖRÜ PELİN MAVİLİ - Kısa olsun dediğiniz için sunumda değinmediğim bazı hususlara da -sordu Tuncay Bey- bu vesileyle değinmiş olacağım; bana da fırsat oldu, sağ olsunlar.
Öncelikle, bir kısmı yorumları beğenmediğini de söyledi; takdirle karşılıyorum, not ettim hepsini. Öncelikle -az önce söylemiştik- burası bizim için de bir öğrenme fırsatı; buradan duyduğumuz hiçbir şey sadece bir kenara yazılacak hususlar değil, geri bildirimle sistemin içine girecek hususlar. O yüzden teşekkür ediyorum her şeyden önce.
Bir şeyi çok doğru söyledi, ben de söyledim, herhâlde duyulmadı, bir daha sesli söylemek isterim; Türk dizi ve film endüstrisi bizden önce çok kuvvetliydi, bizi de buraya gelmek de motive eden unsur zaten buydu. O konuda kesinlikle mutabıkız ama nasıl katkı verdiğimizle ilgili... Mesela, senaryodan bahsettiği için söyleyeyim: Biliyorsunuz, bizim -çok basitinden bir örnek olacak ama- dizi ve filmlerimiz biraz uzunca ve iki-iki küsur saat süren içerikler ve bizim senaristlerimiz bu tip senaryo yazmaya alışkınlar ama yeni dünyada, uluslararası arenada rekabetçi olmak için biraz daha farklı yetkinlikler, daha kısa sürede daha etkili hikâye anlatmak gibi hususlar var; bu noktada çok ciddi senaryo eğitimleri veriyoruz. Her birinden tek tek bahsetmedim ama bahsettiği bir husus oldu, sinema ve televizyon bence dijital mecralarla hâlâ çok el ele giden ve birbirini büyüten işler. Bizim en çok izlenen içeriklerimizin ciddi bir kısmı bizden önce Türkiye'de sinemaya çıkmış içerikler ve altı aylık bir pencere var, o altı ay sinemadan sonra bize gelemiyorlar. Dolayısıyla hâlâ sinemanın ciddi bir fırsatı var ve onun da büyümesini çok önemsiyoruz. Oradan alacağımız içerikleri memnuniyetle... İkinci bir nefes olarak kendimizi görüyoruz, üstte görmek gibi bir şey söz konusu değil.
Bir şey söyledim ama sanıyorum duyulmadı, bir daha söylemek isterim: Bugüne kadar Türk kamusuyla paylaştığımız, gerek RTÜK'le gerek Ticaret Bakanlığıyla gerek Maliyeyle gerek Rekabet Kurumuyla farklı vesilelerle bilgi, belge taleplerinde paylaştığımız verileri yüce Meclisin bilmesinde tabii ki hiçbir sakınca olamaz, yoktur da. En başta da söylediğim gibi, bu rakamları paylaşmak bir beis değil ancak borsaya kote bir şirket olmamızdan kaynaklı olarak basınla veri paylaşabileceğimiz dönemler ve paylaşabilecek kişiler çok kısıtlı. O sebeple, basın önünde paylaşamayacağız. Tuncay Bey'in arzu ettiği gibi, eğer kısa, kısıtlı bir kapalı zamanımız olursa ya da yazılı, sözlü, bunu temin etmek mümkün; sanıyorum duyulmadı, onun da altını çizmek isterim.
Ebeveyn kontrolleri ve bu konularda söylediklerini, takdirini duydum, çok da memnun oldum ve bunlar da tabii ki her zaman geliştirilmeye açık. Şunu çok net söylemek isterim: Bir çalışanı olarak Netflix'le ilgili beni en çok etkileyen şey, Netflix öğrenen bir organizasyon, Netflix her şeyi doğru yapmıyor; ilk gün de yapmıyordu bugün de yapmıyordur ama gelişime çok açık; duyuyor, adapte oluyor, öğreniyor. Mesela "Yenileri gelecektir, daha iyileri gelecektir." dedi, çok haklı Tuncay Bey. O anlamda, kendi DNA'sı da zaten bir sektörü yeniden inşa etmekle kurulmuş bir şirket olduğu için Netflix böyle alternatiflerin geleceğini de çok iyi biliyor, o yüzden sürekli kendini yenilemeye çalışıyor. Sizinle yaptığımız bu istişare de yenilenme araçlarından biri, sizden de öğrendiklerimiz bu sisteme entegre olacak. O yüzden, hem eleştirileri için hem önerileri için çok teşekkür ediyorum. Arzu ettiğimiz şekilde bir fırsat olursa daha etraflı bilgi paylaşacağımız da bir kere daha duyulsun isterim; onu da tekrar söylemek istiyorum.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Sayın Başkanım, ben galiba net olarak, açık anlatamadım.
BAŞKAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Buyurun efendim.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Dijital bağımlılık konusunda konuştuk ve siz bununla... Gençlerin zaman yönetiminde, çocukların zaman yönetiminde, yetişkinlerin zaman yönetiminde çok baskıcı ve onları ele geçiren bir tutum var diğer dijital bağımlılık yaratan yayınlarda ve mecralarda olduğu gibi. Örneğin, bu konuda bir planlamanız var mı? Hani "6 diziyi peş peşe izlerim, iki saatten izlerim, günümü bitiririm; ondan sonra gider yatarım, kalkarım, mutfakta bir şey yerim, tekrar Netflix
dizisi izlerim." sorununun önüne geçebilecek zaman bağımlılığını nasıl yöneteceksiniz? Yani benim sorduğum şeyler, aslında içerik olarak anlatmak istediğim şeyler sizin burada dile getirmediğiniz ama hepimizin Netflix'te ya da diğer dijital mecralarda gözlediğimiz sorunların aşılması konusunda sizin neler yaptığınız konusundaki bir şey. Örneğin, çocuk oturdu, Son Hava Bükücü Avatar'ın...
BAŞKAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Efendim, onun formülü bulundu mu ki?
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - İşte efendim, ne çalışıyorlar? Biliyorsunuz, sorun, halk açısından endişeyi ortadan kaldıracak, güvenliği artıracak... Örneğin, yirmi dört saat boyunca kendisini izleyen bir adama "Kardeşim, niye seyrediyorsun? Hayat Netflix'te geçmez, haydi git, başka şeyler yap." diyen bir formülasyon üzerinde çalışıyorlar mı?
BAŞKAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Tamam, formül var, dinleyecek mi vatandaş?
NETFLIX KAMU POLİTİKALARI DİREKTÖRÜ PELİN MAVİLİ - Bizde bir tane var.
records.englishTranslation:
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Thank you, President.
Welcome friends.
NETFLIX PUBLIC POLICIES DIRECTOR PELİN MAVİLİ - We welcome you.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - You are an international company, aren't you? You broadcast in 190 countries, generating a revenue of approximately over 33 billion dollars. Your net profit after EBITDA is close to 10 billion dollars in the world, and I calculate your profit in Türkiye as follows. How much did you invest in RTÜK share 1.5?
NETFLIX PUBLIC POLICIES DIRECTOR PELİN MAVİLİ - Let me share this in an environment where there is no press, Dear Deputy.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - When I look at it this way, I assume that you have earned an income exceeding 200 million dollars. What you have done is not enough; your investment in Türkiye needs to reach greater dimensions. You are not doing these as a favor to us. All of these; Things you need to do, things you get paid for, things you have to pay to the Turkish people. You have a better, more sensitive broadcasting system than many broadcasting organizations, I congratulate you, but you have come this far without any criticism because you manage corporate communication in a single-track manner. We "Support" you in Türkiye or around the world. For thousands of years, people have been giving every second of their lives for the cultural works you mentioned. You don't add value to them, you earn income by delivering those valuable things to people. You do not run advertisements for now, but you continue to work on advertising through subscription revenues. Thank you for what you have done regarding all of this, but I would like to say that we do not see it enough.
MAYOR HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - "Yes, but it is not enough." you say?
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - It is not enough, it will never be enough, because you, as a multinational company, intervened in Türkiye's cultural life in such a way that you intervened in the cultural life of the world in such a way that you destroyed the cinema industry. Entering our house and offering us everything is a "Oh look, I'm doing something big for you too." Don't tell. You come to our house; You catch our children, women and people at their weakest moments, when they are in bed or sitting at home, and you create a cultural impact against them. If you think that this will not be measured, this will not be inspected, and you will not demand something better than this, you are deceived.
When you come here, you do what all foreign companies, all multinational companies do. RTÜK is an organization here, we are responsible for all this figure. Hiding data from the Turkish Grand National Assembly or hiding data from the Turkish media won't do you any good because we can get that data, everything, from the stock market in America anyway. So, we can work on all of these, but when you stand here with the attitude of an international company that belittles us and does not present this data, this is not a good thing for you. This place represents the Turkish nation. Personally, I can say many things, but it is the responsibility of the Turkish nation that restrains me. In that context, I would like to offer you a few things and ask you.

Before moving on, Mr. President - this is the welcome part - we agree with you very much and demand urgent measures regarding virtual gambling and gaming sites, which will protect our children and Türkiye, and if you invite us to do whatever kind of work you bring from this practice that has caused trouble to the world, we will support you until the end. The legal aspect is also included; Gambling does not have illegal or legal content, it has its own culture, such as Spor Toto, Lotto, National Lottery. We have seen how all kinds of practices other than these in the world collapse societies. According to a study conducted in Las Vegas, America, it causes three things. Today, Las Vegas seems to be the center of casinos, the American government has limited its gambling income from there to 25 percent, and it generates income from the "entertainment" entertainment department. Gambling increases the extent of corruption in society; It impoverishes the people of the city and the people where it exists. Most of all, it impoverishes the poor, and causes great harm by exploiting the last hope and last penny in their pockets. We cannot leave our people helpless in the face of virtual gambling and other applications and games. We want to contribute a lot in this regard, our people are not helpless. We call on everyone to fight against gambling together. We agree with your call and say: Wherever there is gambling,
We will support you by contributing whatever you bring to this issue to eradicate it.
Also, I would like to make an appeal to the Ministry of Health here: Just like with cigarettes, we need to start from somewhere to fight against drugs and gambling, as well as treatment - as you know, this is an addiction problem - by opening a toll-free hotline for its treatment and providing free health treatment services to our people. Maybe Netflix will look more carefully at its content regarding gambling and virtual gambling.
Our people are not abandoned, we are here as their representatives. It is absolutely necessary to correct Türkiye in terms of the settings you mentioned, it is necessary to contribute, it is necessary to adapt it to the new age.
Hollywood burned, Netflix burned Hollywood first. Fights, big noises, Netflix appeared as a cultural problem, but today it is in a position to build its hegemony. But, as you know, the hegemony of companies lasts until a better one comes along; It will happen tomorrow, it will happen the next day, it will end somehow. So I advise you to get your public communication right, you are doing it wrong.
Secondly, we thank you for your contributions to the expansion of Türkiye's cultural life, but remember, we contribute a lot to you. We come from so many struggles for you to win in cultural life that you are not above us by telling our stories; You are nothing of our stories, you are an international company, you make money from our stories. We knew how to make films before you, we were going and winning awards before you.
NETFLIX PUBLIC POLICIES DIRECTOR PELİN MAVİLİ - Of course, of course.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - While there was no Netflix or anything, we received gold, bronze and platinum awards from the New York Festival; You weren't there.

While interpreting all these processes yourself, please interpret them with respect for these experiences.
Third, I also appreciate the things you do right. Especially your distinctions between children, adults and youth, and your related classifications, are something that can be an example for others, but you have to do these anyway because you are heading towards monopoly. Is there any other company in the world that is watched so much in 192 countries? You have several successors coming. But you cannot escape the responsibilities that your monopoly position imposes on you. Therefore, while managing all these processes, you have to provide clear information here about the contribution you will make to Türkiye's culture, values ​​and economy. Just pretending to be an ad here without giving this clear information.
Your last "teaser" was bad. I am a man who knows these things; Both the music is bad and the promotion is bad, an amateurism that I wouldn't expect from you. Make better movies while coming here, come; Don't come with such bad movies. This is not a medium where your commercials will be broadcast, you should come here by providing information.
Now, what did you tell us, as a multinational company? You didn't say your earnings, you couldn't tell your number of members. In other words, "I released the film of the Directorate of Communications." "President, you spoke so eloquently, I included that film as well." etc., it's not like that. The language in your movies is bad. You attribute such features in your films to the producers, without taking any responsibility yourself. Why don't you do these things and make your language more beautiful Turkish? Why don't you invest in that field? Why don't you do any work to contribute to Turkish? "We produced 60 Turkish content." You say, all of these contents are produced according to your international policies. Your policies apply, not our policies. We only have bans, but I don't think you think much about cultural development and enrichment while contributing to those contents. There is nothing in their scenarios, in the scenarios you produce, in the works you produce, that will expand the local industry, but only expand it. Why don't you try to expand the industry here in Türkiye, but instead try to make more money by expanding it? Why do you keep your scenario investment only to a certain extent and not make it stronger and more qualified? What you have just presented shows your attitude towards the educational potential that will meet your intermediate staff needs, but here I can say that you are very inadequate in terms of script enrichment, investment in the Turkish language, and investment in Turkish artists.
We'll talk more about all this, but for now I'll just say that you're not giving anything away, you're not coming here with any enlightening information, you're coming with Netflix propaganda.
And I don't think it would be very convenient for you to go from here like this. President, you can provide us with a five-minute closed session, so that our friends can share the information they do not want to share.
Thank you.
CHAIRMAN HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Ms. Pelin, come on.
Mr. Tuncay Özkan is an experienced citizen of the Republic of Türkiye, his criticisms are harsh but their content is important; I bring it to your attention.

I think you won't answer with a defense mechanism anyway. Let me take your very short answer, then I will take the questions of Ms. Sevilay, Mr. Sarıgül and brother Levent. It's too short.
NETFLIX PUBLIC POLICIES DIRECTOR PELİN MAVİLİ - On this occasion, I will touch upon some issues that I did not mention in the presentation because you wanted it to be short - Mr. Tuncay asked; It was an opportunity for me too, thank you.
First of all, some of them also said that they did not like the comments; I appreciate it, I noted it all. First of all - we just said - this is a learning opportunity for us too; Nothing we hear here is not just something to be written aside, but something that will be included in the system through feedback. So, first of all, I thank you.
He said something very correctly, I said it too, it probably went unheard, I would like to say it louder again; The Turkish TV series and film industry was very strong before us, and this was the factor that motivated us to come here. We absolutely agree on that, but it's about how we contribute. For example, since he is talking about the script, let me tell you: You know, our TV series and movies are a bit long and last two or two hours, and our screenwriters are used to writing this type of script, but in the new world, in order to be competitive in the international arena, there are slightly different competencies, such as telling more effective stories in a shorter time; At this point, we provide very serious scenario training. I didn't mention each of them one by one, but there was something he mentioned. In my opinion, cinema and television still go hand in hand with digital media and magnify each other. A significant part of our most watched content is the content that was released in cinemas in Türkiye before us, and there is a six-month window, after that six months of cinema, they cannot come to us. Therefore, cinema still has a serious opportunity and we attach great importance to its growth. We will gladly receive the content we receive from there. We see ourselves as a second breath, there is no such thing as seeing ourselves above.
I said something, but I think it was not heard, I would like to say it again: Of course, there can and is no harm in the Supreme Assembly knowing the data we have shared with the Turkish public so far, both with RTÜK, the Ministry of Commerce, the Ministry of Finance and the Competition Authority, in requests for information and documents on different occasions. As I said at the beginning, sharing these figures is not a problem, but since we are a company listed on the stock exchange, the periods and people who can share data with the press are very limited. For this reason, we will not be able to share it in front of the press. As Mr. Tuncay wishes, if we have a short, limited free time or it is possible to provide this in writing or verbally; I think it was not heard, I would like to underline that.
I heard your appreciation about parental controls and these issues, I was very pleased with them, and of course, these are always open to improvement. I want to say this very clearly: The thing that impresses me most about Netflix as an employee is that Netflix is ​​a learning organization, Netflix does not do everything right; He didn't do it on the first day and he doesn't do it today, but he is very open to improvement; It hears, it adapts, it learns.

For example, "New ones will come, better ones will come." said Mr. Tuncay, he is very right. In that sense, since Netflix is ​​a company whose own DNA has already been established by rebuilding an industry, it knows very well that such alternatives will come, so it is constantly trying to renew itself. This consultation with you is one of the tools of renewal, and what we learn from you will be integrated into this system. Therefore, I thank you very much for both your criticism and suggestions. I would like to hear from you once again that we will share more detailed information if we have the opportunity we desire; I want to say that again.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Mr. President, I think I did not explain it clearly.
PRESIDENT HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Here you go, sir.
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - We talked about digital addiction and you with this. There is a very oppressive and taking over attitude in young people's time management, in children's time management, in adults' time management, as in other publications and media that create digital addiction. For example, do you have any plans about this? You know, "I watch 6 TV series in a row, watch for two hours, finish my day; then I go to bed, get up, eat something in the kitchen, watch Netflix again."
I watch TV series." How will you manage time addiction to prevent the problem? So, what I'm asking, actually what I want to tell you in terms of content, is about what you have done to overcome the problems that we all observe on Netflix or other digital media, which you have not mentioned here. For example, the boy sat in Avatar's The Last Airbender.
PRESIDENT HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - Sir, has its formula been found?
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Here sir, what do they study? You know, the problem will eliminate anxiety for the public and increase security. For example, to a man who watches him for twenty-four hours, "Brother, why are you watching? Life is not spent on Netflix, go ahead and do something else." Are they working on a formulation that says:
MAYOR HÜSEYİN YAYMAN - OK, there is a formula, will the citizens listen?
NETFLIX PUBLIC POLICIES DIRECTOR PELİN MAVİLİ - We have one.

records.title: Netflix Kamu Politikaları Direktörü Pelin Mavili tarafından yapılan sunuma ilişkin görüşme münasebetiyle

fields.Subject: Netflix Kamu Politikaları Direktörü Pelin Mavili tarafından yapılan sunuma ilişkin görüşme münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish:
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Partimizin bu LGBT konusundaki tutumu, evrensel ilkelere bağlılıktır, evrensel insan hakları ilkelerine bağlılıktır. Yani normal ile anormali birbirinden ayırarak olayı incelemek gerekir. Yaşamın anormal kısımları var, suç kısımları var, onunla mücadele kısımları var, yaşamın normal kısımları var. Biz burada normali ele alıyoruz, anormal kısım, yayıncı kuruluşların evrensel ilkelere aykırı olarak, propaganda amacıyla, özendirmek amacıyla, yol açmak amacıyla gençlerin, çocukları "Siz sarı saçlı olun, pembe saçlı olun, mavi saçlı olun." diye bir özendirmesidir; cinsellik bunun içinde çok önemli bir noktadır. Çocuklarımızın cinsel sağlığının korunması, ailenin korunması konusunda çok hassasız ama bunun evrensel insan hakları ilkelerine aykırılık taşıyacak boyutlara taşınmasına da karşıyız çünkü insanlık bu konuda çok yol katetti, biz o noktada evrensel ilkelerin yanındayız.
Teşekkür ederim efendim.
records.englishTranslation:
AHMET TUNCAY ÖZKAN (İzmir) - Our party's attitude on this LGBT issue is commitment to universal principles, commitment to universal human rights principles. In other words, it is necessary to examine the event by distinguishing between normal and abnormal. There are abnormal parts of life, there are crime parts, there are fighting-it parts, there are normal parts of life. We are dealing with the normal here, the abnormal part is that broadcasting organizations, contrary to universal principles, for the purpose of propaganda, for the purpose of encouraging, for the purpose of paving the way, encourage young people to say "You have blonde hair, you have pink hair, you have blue hair." It is an encouragement to say; Sexuality is a very important point in this. We are very sensitive about protecting the sexual health of our children and protecting the family, but we are against taking this to a level that would contradict universal human rights principles, because humanity has come a long way in this regard, and we stand by universal principles at that point.
Thank you sir.
